content.json:
# SpyCloud Compromised Account Protection (CAP) Dashboard
**Account Takeover Prevention** - Monitor compromised accounts, credential pairs, and account protection status from SpyCloud CAP data.

> This workbook focuses exclusively on SpyCloudCAP_CL data for tracking compromised credentials that require immediate protective action.

---

parameters.name: SeverityFilter
parameters.query: SpyCloudCAP_CL | distinct severity | order by severity desc
parameters.label: Severity

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(Label:string, Value:long, Order:int)["Compromised Accounts", 0, 1, "Unique Users", 0, 2, "Plaintext Credentials", 0, 3, "Critical Severity", 0, 4, "Distinct Breach Sources", 0, 5]),
(SpyCloudCAP_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize v=count() | extend Label="Compromised Accounts", Order=1 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(SpyCloudCAP_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize v=dcount(email) | extend Label="Unique Users", Order=2 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(SpyCloudCAP_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where isnotempty(password_plaintext) | summarize v=count() | extend Label="Plaintext Credentials", Order=3 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(SpyCloudCAP_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where severity == 25 | summarize v=count() | extend Label="Critical Severity", Order=4 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(SpyCloudCAP_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize v=dcount(source_id) | extend Label="Distinct Breach Sources", Order=5 | project Label, Value=v, Order)
| summarize Value=max(Value) by Label, Order
| order by Order asc
content.title: CAP Overview

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudCAP_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize CompromisedAccounts=count(), PlaintextCount=countif(isnotempty(password_plaintext)) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| order by TimeGenerated asc)
content.title: Compromised Account Trend (Daily)

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudCAP_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and isnotempty(email)
| summarize Compromises=count(), MaxSeverity=max(severity), PlaintextPWs=countif(isnotempty(password_plaintext)), DistinctSources=dcount(source_id), LatestCompromise=max(TimeGenerated) by email
| extend RiskLevel = case(MaxSeverity == 25, "CRITICAL", MaxSeverity == 20, "HIGH", MaxSeverity == 5, "MEDIUM", "LOW")
| top 25 by MaxSeverity desc, Compromises desc
| project User=email, RiskLevel, Compromises, PlaintextPWs, DistinctSources, LatestCompromise)
content.title: Top 25 Compromised Users

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudCAP_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend SeverityLabel = case(severity == 25, "Critical", severity == 20, "High", severity == 5, "Medium", severity == 2, "Low", "Other")
| summarize Count=count() by SeverityLabel)
content.title: CAP Severity Distribution

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudCAP_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and isnotempty(email_domain)
| summarize Compromises=count(), UniqueUsers=dcount(email), CriticalCount=countif(severity == 25) by tostring(email_domain)
| order by Compromises desc
| take 15)
content.title: Compromised Accounts by Domain
